TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Seqeciin, title = Seqeciin, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Seqeciin} }

S.FORM: lang Seqeciin ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taybu go (Dawu), kwara sali buwan nya ga 93 buwan, 229 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 221 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 8 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 93%, Amis 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Seqeciin hya' ga Seqalapit. tay mkyahu' na Seqeciin hya' ga Pacavalj. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Seqeciin ga maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Seqeciin ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

lang Seqeciin ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taybu go (Dawu), kwara sali buwan nya ga 93 buwan, 229 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 221 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 8 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 93%, Amis 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Seqeciin hya' ga Seqalapit. tay mkyahu' na Seqeciin hya' ga Pacavalj. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Seqeciin ga maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Seqeciin ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: laŇč s~…ēeqe ¶~ ®iin …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu tajő≤u …£o (*awu), kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku * ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, pajwan **%, amis~…ē *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkraja Ē na s~…ēeqe ¶~ ®iin ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēeqalapit. taj mkjańßu Ē na s~…ēeqe ¶~ ®iin ńßja Ē …£a pa ¶~ ®a*alj. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj qalaŇč s~…ēeqe ¶~ ®iin …£a maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan qalaŇč s~…ēeqe ¶~ ®iin …£a uŇčat pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
